title: CraftAttack13 Community Modpack
description: An unofficial CraftAttack13 Community Modpack with some popular client side mods
body:
**This is a simple survival Modpack.**

It is designed for the german youtube project "CraftAttack".

Some of the features are:
- Distant Horizon
- Soduim & Iris
- Simple Voice Chat
- World & Mini-Map
- Appleskin

Have fun playing the modpack!

**This is not an official Modpack!**
